items.content:
About This Role

We are looking for a People Operations Coordinator to join our growing HR team. This is a foundational role where you will support the full employee lifecycle, from onboarding new hires to maintaining HR systems and supporting culture initiatives.

If you are passionate about creating an exceptional employee experience and want to build a career in People Operations at a fast-growing tech company, this role is for you.

Responsibilities

  • Coordinate the onboarding process for new hires, including system setup, orientation scheduling, and welcome materials
  • Maintain employee records and HR data in our HRIS (BambooHR)
  • Support benefits administration and respond to employee inquiries
  • Assist with planning and executing company events, team offsites, and culture programs
  • Process employment verifications, status changes, and offboarding procedures
  • Help prepare reports and analytics for the People leadership team

Requirements

  • 1-2 years of experience in HR, people operations, or administrative support
  • Excellent organizational skills and attention to detail
  • Strong interpersonal and communication skills
  • Proficiency with Google Workspace and comfort learning new software tools
  • Ability to handle confidential information with discretion

Nice to Have

  • Experience with HRIS platforms (BambooHR, Rippling, Workday)
  • PHR certification or coursework in Human Resources
  • Experience at a technology startup or high-growth company
